aronui.when_to_use: Use when the user asks to attach, add to chat, or show content of a file in the document list. Requires a valid existing file path.
aronui.output_shape: Displays the file content in the Document Viewer (Anhänge list) panel on the right.

pitfalls.text: Argument 'path' is REQUIRED. Missing or empty path returns error: 'error: Error: path is required.'
Providing a non-existent file path returns error: 'error: Error: File not found: <path>'
Providing a directory instead of a file returns error: 'error: Error: Not a file: <path>'
Tool only works in the Web UI with an active chat session; otherwise returns 'error: Error: No active session (Document Viewer is only available in the Web UI with an active chat session).'

procedure: Ensure you are in the Web UI with an active chat session.
Provide the full file path (e.g., C:\Users\...\file.pdf) as the 'path' parameter.
Confirm the path points to an existing file (not a directory).
Call the tool; the file content appears in the right panel Document Viewer.
verification: Check that the tool did not return an error.
Confirm the file content is displayed in the Document Viewer (Anhänge list) panel.

predict_records.predicted: success: The tool opens the seed.txt file in the Document Viewer and displays its content.
predict_records.actual: error: Error: No active session (Document Viewer is only available in the Web UI with an active chat session).

error: Error: File not found:  (empty path treated as nonexistent file)
error: The tool will return an 'Error: No active session' error because there is no active chat session in the current environment, even though the file path is valid.
